title: PJTSAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 02 GIS Analyst Posts
description: The Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTSAU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 GIS Analyst Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc., B.E./B. Tech in Computer Science, Civil Engineering, can apply for the PJTSAU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have men...
